allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Add vercel.json for SPA routing

- Configure Vercel to route all requests to index.html
- Fixes 404 errors on client-side routes like /auth

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Improve responsive layout with fixed header and footer

- Change Navbar wrapper from div to semantic header element
- Change BottomNav wrapper from nav to semantic footer element  
- Improve fixed positioning to prevent floating with page scroll
- Adjust Feed page padding for better spacing with fixed elements
- Use pointer-events-none on containers for better click handling

This fixes the issue where header and footer were floating with 
page content instead of staying fixed at top/bottom.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Fix header and footer overlapping with content

- Increase top padding from pt-24 to pt-28 to prevent header overlap
- Increase bottom padding from pb-32 to pb-36 on mobile for footer clearance
- Update sidebar sticky positioning from top-24 to top-28
- Ensures content doesn''t hide behind fixed header/footer

Fixes the overlapping issue where navbar and bottom nav were 
covering the main content on both desktop and mobile views.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Major comment section improvements

Performance & UX:
- Add useMemo import for future optimization
- Auto-collapse nested replies by default (expand with arrow)
- Fix bottom composer bar spacing (mb-20 on mobile to avoid nav overlap)
- Add upload progress indicator with percentage display
- Remove repost functionality (not needed for campus platform)

Accessibility:
- Add ARIA labels to all comment action buttons
- Add alt text to image previews
- Improve screen reader support

Features:
- Show reply count with collapse/expand toggle
- Display upload progress overlay on images
- Better visual feedback during image upload

This improves comment threading UX and makes the platform
more accessible while removing unnecessary social features.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
